description.ko: 부드럽고 빛나는 질감을 통해 식물 같은 균사체와 폐 구조를 결합한 호흡하는 생물학적 실체에 대한 매크로 탐구입니다.
description.en: A macro exploration of a breathing biological entity, blending plant-like mycelium with pulmonary architecture through soft, glowing textures.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Celestial Alveoli.' A sprawling, pulsating organic network of #7FB069 emerald moss-like membranes and #2D5A3D deep vascular vines. The entity functions as a massive biological bellows, rhythmically exhaling clouds of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores into a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent atmosphere. Macro focus on the translucent, semi-permeable cellular textures revealing internal capillary networks of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow. 8k resolution.
